goal: Harden and expand backend for project-wide core flows: persistent story saves, persistent player progress, and safer API contract for runtime integration.
constraints: Keep existing match API behavior backward compatible.
Avoid adding heavyweight external dependencies in this task.
Implement deterministic file-based persistence under server-managed data directory.
deliverables: Persistent story save store and REST routes under /api/v1/story.
Persistent player progress store and REST routes under /api/v1/progress.
Validation and explicit error responses for malformed payloads and slot misuse.
Updated backend README documenting new endpoints and run expectations.
acceptance_commands: node -e "const { createInMemoryMatchStore } = require('./server/store/match-store.cjs'); const { createApp } = require('./server/app.cjs'); const s = createInMemoryMatchStore(); const { app } = createApp({ matchStore: s }); console.log(!!app ? 'backend-app-ok' : 'backend-app-fail');"
